lead: Facts on this page are verified against the sources below; uncertain figures (starting credits, exact starter-zone duration, live ship prices) are flagged in-text rather than guessed.

sources.label: Steam Community
sources.what: New-player first-session steps, docking speeds, career tracks and milestones (corroborate prices independently — its Cobra Mk V cost is inaccurate).

sources.label: ED Wiki — Ranks
sources.what: The six rank tracks and the nine-step Harmless→Elite ladder plus Elite I–V.

sources.label: ED Wiki — LHS 3447
sources.what: Starter systems, Trevithick Dock and the loaned Sidewinder in the Pilots' Federation District.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Sidewinder
sources.what: Starter-ship role; Pilots' Federation insures ≥95%; free-Sidewinder loan on bankruptcy.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Pilots Federation
sources.what: New-pilot rebuy discount until your first rank-up; district onboarding.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Cobra Mk V
sources.what: Cobra Mk V purchasable for credits since 24 Apr 2025; price ~1.99M.

sources.label: INARA — Ships
sources.what: Current verified hull purchase prices (Adder, Viper Mk III, Diamondback Explorer, Cobra Mk V).

sources.label: EDCD — coriolis-data
sources.what: Canonical hull retailCost values (the exact base purchase prices shown in the early-hulls table).
